summary: Phase II SYNAPTIQ testing complete. Backend: 28/28 tests passing across Phase I regression + 8 new modules (Journals, Conferences, Funding, Grants, Workspaces, Manuscripts, Publication Hub, Repository). Frontend: All critical flows verified — login, sidebar dropdowns (Discover auto-open, Projects auto-open on child routes), journals listing/detail, workspace create + activity note posting, manuscript create with 9 default sections + editor save, funding save → appears in /grants Saved tab, repository create item, publication-hub kanban render, conferences/funding seeded counts (~10/12).

minor.issue: Journal docs use 'title' field, not 'name' — purely a documentation note (filter logic itself correct: subject=Healthcare returns 4 journals incl. Lancet/JAMA; quartile=Q1 + open_access=true returns 2 incl. Nature/PLOS ONE)
Body schema uses {message, kind} not {content, type} — frontend WorkspaceDetail.jsx already aligns. Worth documenting in API contract.

design_issues.screen: Manuscripts list (and likely other pages with <select>)
issues: React hydration console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Emergent dev source-tracking wrapper injects <span data-ve-dynamic="true" style="display:contents"> inside <option> tags rendered from dynamic arrays (e.g., projects/journals dropdowns in Manuscripts.jsx line 85, ManuscriptDetail.jsx). Functional impact: none — dropdowns render and select properly. Cosmetic: noisy dev console. Likely environment/tooling artifact rather than app code.

action_items: (Optional) Investigate <span> inside <option> hydration warning in Manuscripts.jsx/ManuscriptDetail.jsx — may be Emergent dev wrapper auto-instrumenting array-rendered <option> children. Consider hoisting label text via a plain template literal or attribute to prevent the wrapper from inserting <span>.
(Doc) Add brief OpenAPI/docstring note that workspace activity body is {message, kind} and journals use 'title' field — to avoid future tester confusion.
critical_code_review_comments: Permissions enforced correctly: workspaces (403 for non-member) and manuscripts (403 for non-author) both verified.
Repository GET uses ObjectId casting with try/except — good. Excludes _id consistently via _ser helper across all 8 new routers (good DRY pattern).
Phase I regression unaffected: collaborations (6+), projects, discover feed, auth all green.
Funding/grants share underlying collection; saved_funding_ids array on user updated atomically on save/unsave — round-trip verified.

Manuscript creation auto-seeds 9 expected section keys (title, abstract, introduction, literature_review, methodology, results, discussion, conclusion, references) — verified in detail response and via frontend section nav count.
test_credentials: elena.varga@synaptiq.io / demo123 (primary), marcus.okafor@synaptiq.io / demo123, aiko.tanaka@synaptiq.io / demo123 — all from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed workspaces/manuscripts/repository items via Elena. No cleanup teardown but data is namespaced and non-destructive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend phase2 test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_phase2_test.py — keep for regression. Field naming gotchas: journals.title (not .name), workspace activity body is {message, kind}, repository filter is item_type query param but stored field is 'type'. Discover sidebar dropdown auto-opens on /discover or its 6 children; Projects dropdown auto-opens on /projects, /workspaces, /manuscripts. Funding 'save' adds to user.saved_funding_ids and surfaces under /api/grants → saved.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing tests after minor test selector corrections (journals use 'title' field; workspace activity payload uses {message, kind}). Backend implementation is correct and consistent with frontend usage.
